summary: P0-05 Kategori Leaf -> Form Template Final Doğrulama COMPLETE. All acceptance criteria verified: Inventory unmapped_publishable_count=0, 12/12 E2E matrix PASS, Negative API tests return 404 with meaningful detail, UI controlled error shows schema warning messages (not blank screen).
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Inventory unmapped_publishable_count = 0 (22 publishable leaves all mapped)
PASS: E2E Matrix 12/12 PASS (6 real_estate + 6 vehicle leaves)

PASS: All 10 E2E steps per leaf verified (leaf_select_validate, form_render_schema, create_draft, validation_enforcement, save_valid_draft, preview_ready, preview_fetch, submit_publish_request, publish_admin_approve, public_detail)
PASS: Negative API /api/catalog/schema with fake leaf returns 404 + 'Kategori bulunamadı'
PASS: Negative API /api/categories/validate with fake leaf returns 404 + 'Category not found'
PASS: UI Controlled Error - fake leaf on /ilan-ver/detaylar shows 'Kategori şeması alınamadı' warning + disabled blocks (NOT blank screen)
PASS: DE + FR country coverage maintained in inventory
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0-05 Leaf Template Final Doğrulama verified complete. All 22 publishable leaves across DE+FR are mapped. 12 representative leaves tested through full E2E flow (leaf selection -> schema -> draft -> validation -> preview -> publish -> admin approve -> public detail). Negative API tests confirm 404 responses with meaningful Turkish/English error messages. UI shows controlled error messages when schema fetch fails for unmapped/fake categories.

ui_controlled_error_test.scenario: Navigate to /ilan-ver/detaylar with fake category ID in localStorage
ui_controlled_error_test.expected_behavior: Controlled error messages, not blank screen
ui_controlled_error_test.actual_behavior: Shows 'Kategori şeması alınamadı' warning + disabled blocks for each form section
disabled_blocks_shown: Parametre bloğu admin konfigürasyonu eksik/pasif olduğu için devre dışı
